steps.title: Convert the percent increase
steps.content:
A $9\%$ increase means the new population is the original population plus $9\%$ of the original population.
$$1+\frac{9}{100}=1+0.09=1.09$$

steps.title: Identify the multiplier
steps.content: The $2018$ population is $1.09$ times the $2017$ population, so $k=1.09$. The answer is C.
